root_causes.title: Croner UI wiring gap
root_causes.description: Scheduler toggle and snooze exist in IPC but lack UI integration. Weekly/monthly models exist but lack UI form support.
root_causes.solution_summary: Add toggle and snooze UI elements in TardisPage.tsx. Add weekly and monthly kind types, and input support in ScheduleForm.tsx.

root_causes.title: Activity feed scroll anchor missing
root_causes.description: ActivityFeed renders items in a ScrollArea but doesn't automatically scroll to bottom when new messages arrive.
root_causes.solution_summary: Add a ref to an empty div at the bottom of the ScrollArea and trigger scrollIntoView on `activities` updates.

root_causes.title: Snippet hardcoded save path
root_causes.description: The `snippets.json` manifest path is hardcoded to `D:/fuse/snippets.json` in `electron/snippets.ts`, breaking snippet persistence on machines without this drive.
root_causes.solution_summary: Change `MANIFEST_PATH` to derive from `app.getPath('userData')` instead of the hardcoded D: drive path.

root_causes.title: Missing SDK IPC methods
root_causes.description: Several SDK methods are not exposed via IPC, though they exist in the underlying SDK.
root_causes.solution_summary: Add missing methods to `SdkIpc` interface, `handlers.ts` bridge, and potentially `bridge.ts`.

tasks.title: Implement Croner UI wiring
Fix Activity Feed Scroll Behavior
Fix Snippet Hardcoded Save Path
tasks.prompt:
You are tasked with fixing issue #18: Snippets not persisting.

The root cause is in `electron/snippets.ts`. The `MANIFEST_PATH` is hardcoded to an absolute path: `D:/fuse/snippets.json`.

Files to modify:
`electron/snippets.ts`

Implementation:
- Import `app` from `electron`.
- Change `MANIFEST_PATH` to be a dynamically computed path using `app.getPath('userData')`.

```diff
// Before
import { ipcMain } from 'electron'
import type { WebContents } from 'electron'
import fs from 'fs-extra'
import * as path from 'path'
import chokidar from 'chokidar'
import { FuseManifest, FUSE_ROOT } from '../src/shared/fuse'
import type { FuseManifest as FuseManifestType } from '../src/shared/fuse'
import { store } from './store'

const MANIFEST_PATH = 'D:/fuse/snippets.json'
const EMPTY_MANIFEST: FuseManifestType = { version: 1, items: [] }
// After
import { ipcMain, app } from 'electron'
import type { WebContents } from 'electron'
import fs from 'fs-extra'
import * as path from 'path'
import chokidar from 'chokidar'
import { FuseManifest, FUSE_ROOT } from '../src/shared/fuse'
import type { FuseManifest as FuseManifestType } from '../src/shared/fuse'
import { store } from './store'

const MANIFEST_PATH = path.join(app.getPath('userData'), 'snippets.json')
const EMPTY_MANIFEST: FuseManifestType = { version: 1, items: [] }
```

Acceptance Criteria:
- No hardcoded `D:/` paths exist in `electron/snippets.ts`.
- Snippets manifest is saved to the user data directory.

You may ONLY modify the files listed above. If a test file outside your boundary fails, you must make your source changes backward-compatible so the existing test passes unmodified. Do NOT rename, move, or delete any files outside your boundary.

tasks.title: Expose Missing SDK Methods via IPC

unaddressable.reason: MediaArtifact is already fully implemented to handle video (video/*), audio (audio/*), and images. The issue description is outdated compared to the current codebase state.
